mapper.select: SELECT stck_shrn_iscd, hts_kor_isnm, stck_prpr, prdy_ctrt, prdy_vrss_sign FROM HC_stock_daily1 WHERE stck_shrn_iscd IS NOT NULL AND hts_kor_isnm IS NOT NULL AND hts_kor_isnm != ''

SELECT stck_bsop_date, stck_oprc, stck_hgpr, stck_lwpr, stck_clpr FROM
HC_stock_minute2 HC_stock_weekly2 HC_stock_monthly2 HC_stock_daily2
WHERE stck_shrn_iscd = #{code} ORDER BY stck_bsop_date ASC
